languages.text:
After {g|f:f455dc1c487a44fc9e0e8010024a031a}Twitchy{/g}, is lost, gain {g|f:a2a18602d2004e19b979cd6d4e5d91ef}Sluggish{/g}.
Can only be equipped by von Valancius.

traits.locale_text:
After {g|f:f455dc1c487a44fc9e0e8010024a031a}Twitchy{/g}, is lost, gain {g|f:a2a18602d2004e19b979cd6d4e5d91ef}Sluggish{/g}.
Can only be equipped by von Valancius.

languages.text:
When the {g|f:f455dc1c487a44fc9e0e8010024a031a}kinetic acceleration{/g} effect is removed, the user suffers the {g|f:a2a18602d2004e19b979cd6d4e5d91ef}inertial recoil{/g} effect.
Can only be equipped by the Rogue Trader.
languages.original_text:
After {g|f:f455dc1c487a44fc9e0e8010024a031a}Twitchy{/g}, is lost, gain {g|f:a2a18602d2004e19b979cd6d4e5d91ef}Sluggish{/g}.
Can only be equipped by von Valancius.

traits.locale_text:
When the {g|f:f455dc1c487a44fc9e0e8010024a031a}kinetic acceleration{/g} effect is removed, the user suffers the {g|f:a2a18602d2004e19b979cd6d4e5d91ef}inertial recoil{/g} effect.
While the user has {g|f:6338756ef76148369f50bc5d6d48ac4a}crippled leg{/g}, the {g|f:a2a18602d2004e19b979cd6d4e5d91ef}inertial recoil{/g} effect is never removed.
Can only be equipped by von Valancius.

When the {g|f:f455dc1c487a44fc9e0e8010024a031a}kinetic acceleration{/g} effect is removed, the user suffers the {g|f:a2a18602d2004e19b979cd6d4e5d91ef}inertial recoil{/g} effect.
While the user has {g|f:6338756ef76148369f50bc5d6d48ac4a}crippled leg{/g}, the {g|f:a2a18602d2004e19b979cd6d4e5d91ef}inertial recoil{/g} effect is never removed.
Can only be equipped by von Valancius.

When the {g|f:f455dc1c487a44fc9e0e8010024a031a}kinetic acceleration{/g} effect is removed, the user suffers the {g|f:a2a18602d2004e19b979cd6d4e5d91ef}inertial recoil{/g} effect.
Can only be equipped by the Rogue Trader.

When the {g|f:f455dc1c487a44fc9e0e8010024a031a}kinetic acceleration{/g} effect is removed, the user suffers the {g|f:a2a18602d2004e19b979cd6d4e5d91ef}inertial recoil{/g} effect.
Can only be equipped by the Rogue Trader.

When the {g|f:f455dc1c487a44fc9e0e8010024a031a}kinetic acceleration{/g} effect is removed, the user suffers the {g|f:a2a18602d2004e19b979cd6d4e5d91ef}inertial recoil{/g} effect.
While the user has a {g|f:6338756ef76148369f50bc5d6d48ac4a}crippled leg{/g}, the {g|f:a2a18602d2004e19b979cd6d4e5d91ef}inertial recoil{/g} effect cannot be removed.
Can only be equipped by a von Valancius.

languages.text:
Когда эффект {g|f:f455dc1c487a44fc9e0e8010024a031a}кинетическое ускорение{/g} снимается, обладатель аугмента получает эффект {g|f:a2a18602d2004e19b979cd6d4e5d91ef}инерционный откат{/g}.
Пока у обладателя аугмента {g|f:6338756ef76148369f50bc5d6d48ac4a}покалечена нога{/g}, эффект {g|f:a2a18602d2004e19b979cd6d4e5d91ef}инерционный откат{/g} снять нельзя.
Может использоваться только Лордом-капитаном фон Валанциус.
languages.original_text:
When the {g|f:f455dc1c487a44fc9e0e8010024a031a}kinetic acceleration{/g} effect is removed, the user suffers the {g|f:a2a18602d2004e19b979cd6d4e5d91ef}inertial recoil{/g} effect.
While the user has a {g|f:6338756ef76148369f50bc5d6d48ac4a}crippled leg{/g}, the {g|f:a2a18602d2004e19b979cd6d4e5d91ef}inertial recoil{/g} effect cannot be removed.
Can only be equipped by a von Valancius.

traits.locale_text:

Пока у обладателя аугмента {g|f:6338756ef76148369f50bc5d6d48ac4a}покалечена нога{/g}, эффект {g|f:a2a18602d2004e19b979cd6d4e5d91ef}инерционный откат{/g} снять нельзя.
Может использоваться только Лордом-капитаном фон Валанциус.

Когда эффект {g|f:f455dc1c487a44fc9e0e8010024a031a}кинетическое ускорение{/g} снимается, обладатель аугмента получает эффект {g|f:a2a18602d2004e19b979cd6d4e5d91ef}инерционный откат{/g}.
Пока у обладателя аугмента {g|f:6338756ef76148369f50bc5d6d48ac4a}покалечена нога{/g}, эффект {g|f:a2a18602d2004e19b979cd6d4e5d91ef}инерционный откат{/g} снять нельзя.
Может использоваться только Лордом-капитаном фон Валанциус.

languages.text:
Cuando se elimine el efecto {g|f:f455dc1c487a44fc9e0e8010024a031a}aceleración cinética{/g}, el usuario sufre el efecto {g|f:a2a18602d2004e19b979cd6d4e5d91ef}retroceso inercial{/g}.
Solo se puede equipar en {mf|el|la} Comerciante Independiente.
languages.original_text:
When the {g|f:f455dc1c487a44fc9e0e8010024a031a}kinetic acceleration{/g} effect is removed, the user suffers the {g|f:a2a18602d2004e19b979cd6d4e5d91ef}inertial recoil{/g} effect.
Can only be equipped by the Rogue Trader.

traits.locale_text:
Cuando se elimine el efecto {g|f:f455dc1c487a44fc9e0e8010024a031a}aceleración cinética{/g}, el usuario sufre el efecto {g|f:a2a18602d2004e19b979cd6d4e5d91ef}retroceso inercial{/g}.
Solo se puede equipar en {mf|el|la} Comerciante Independiente.

languages.text:
Wird {g|f:f455dc1c487a44fc9e0e8010024a031a}Kinetische Beschleunigung{/g} entfernt, wird der Nutzer mit {g|f:a2a18602d2004e19b979cd6d4e5d91ef}Trägheitsrückschlag{/g} belegt.
Kann nur {mf|vom Freihändler|von der Freihändlerin} ausgerüstet werden.
languages.original_text:
When the {g|f:f455dc1c487a44fc9e0e8010024a031a}kinetic acceleration{/g} effect is removed, the user suffers the {g|f:a2a18602d2004e19b979cd6d4e5d91ef}inertial recoil{/g} effect.
Can only be equipped by the Rogue Trader.

traits.locale_text:
Wird {g|f:f455dc1c487a44fc9e0e8010024a031a}Kinetische Beschleunigung{/g} entfernt, wird der Nutzer mit {g|f:a2a18602d2004e19b979cd6d4e5d91ef}Trägheitsrückschlag{/g} belegt.
Kann nur {mf|vom Freihändler|von der Freihändlerin} ausgerüstet werden.

languages.text:
{g|f:f455dc1c487a44fc9e0e8010024a031a}Kinetik hızlanma{/g} etkisi ortadan kalktığında kullanıcı {g|f:a2a18602d2004e19b979cd6d4e5d91ef}eylemsiz geri tepme{/g} etkisine maruz kalır.
Yalnızca Hür Tacir tarafından kuşanılabilir.
languages.original_text:
When the {g|f:f455dc1c487a44fc9e0e8010024a031a}kinetic acceleration{/g} effect is removed, the user suffers the {g|f:a2a18602d2004e19b979cd6d4e5d91ef}inertial recoil{/g} effect.
Can only be equipped by the Rogue Trader.

traits.locale_text:
{g|f:f455dc1c487a44fc9e0e8010024a031a}Kinetik hızlanma{/g} etkisi ortadan kalktığında kullanıcı {g|f:a2a18602d2004e19b979cd6d4e5d91ef}eylemsiz geri tepme{/g} etkisine maruz kalır.
Yalnızca Hür Tacir tarafından kuşanılabilir.

languages.text:
Lorsque l'effet {g|f:f455dc1c487a44fc9e0e8010024a031a}Accélération cinétique{/g} se dissipe, l'utilisateur subit {g|f:a2a18602d2004e19b979cd6d4e5d91ef}Recul inertiel{/g}.
Équipement réservé {mf|au libre-marchand|à la libre-marchande}.
languages.original_text:
When the {g|f:f455dc1c487a44fc9e0e8010024a031a}kinetic acceleration{/g} effect is removed, the user suffers the {g|f:a2a18602d2004e19b979cd6d4e5d91ef}inertial recoil{/g} effect.
Can only be equipped by the Rogue Trader.

traits.locale_text:
Lorsque l'effet {g|f:f455dc1c487a44fc9e0e8010024a031a}Accélération cinétique{/g} se dissipe, l'utilisateur subit {g|f:a2a18602d2004e19b979cd6d4e5d91ef}Recul inertiel{/g}.
Équipement réservé {mf|au libre-marchand|à la libre-marchande}.

languages.text:
当{g|f:f455dc1c487a44fc9e0e8010024a031a}动能加速{/g}效果被移除时，使用者会受到{g|f:a2a18602d2004e19b979cd6d4e5d91ef}惯性反冲{/g}效果。
仅限行商浪人装备。
languages.original_text:
When the {g|f:f455dc1c487a44fc9e0e8010024a031a}kinetic acceleration{/g} effect is removed, the user suffers the {g|f:a2a18602d2004e19b979cd6d4e5d91ef}inertial recoil{/g} effect.
Can only be equipped by the Rogue Trader.

traits.locale_text:
当{g|f:f455dc1c487a44fc9e0e8010024a031a}动能加速{/g}效果被移除时，使用者会受到{g|f:a2a18602d2004e19b979cd6d4e5d91ef}惯性反冲{/g}效果。
仅限行商浪人装备。

languages.text:
{g|f:f455dc1c487a44fc9e0e8010024a031a}運動加速{/g}効果が除去されると、使用者は{g|f:a2a18602d2004e19b979cd6d4e5d91ef}慣性反動{/g}効果を受ける。
ローグトレーダーのみが装備できる。

Can only be equipped by the Rogue Trader.

traits.locale_text:
{g|f:f455dc1c487a44fc9e0e8010024a031a}運動加速{/g}効果が除去されると、使用者は{g|f:a2a18602d2004e19b979cd6d4e5d91ef}慣性反動{/g}効果を受ける。
